debug_info.goal:
case none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
q : ENNReal
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple none q r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[none] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q]

failed_attempts:
have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    subst this
    by_cases hr : r = ⊤
    · subst hr
      simp only [cLpNorm_infty]
      refine iSup_le fun i ↦ ?_
      rw [nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul]
      gcongr
      · exact cLpNorm_infty_le _ _
      · exact le_iSup (fun j ↦ (‖g j‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞)) i
    · simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀ hr]
      refine ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow ?_ (zero_le _)
      rw [← expect_const_mul]
      refine expect_le_expect fun i ↦ ?_
      rw [nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (zero_le _)]
      gcongr
      exact cLpNorm_infty_le _ _

have : q = r := by simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, zero_add] at hpqr; exact ENNReal.inv_injective hpqr.inv_add_inv
    subst this
    lift ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] to ℝ≥0 using cLpNorm_ne_top f with C hC
    rw [hC, ← cLpNorm_smul]
    refine cLpNorm_mono hr₀ fun i ↦ ?_
    rw [norm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul, ← hC]
    simp only [Pi.smul_apply, norm_smul, NNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul]
    gcongr
    exact cLpNorm_le_cLinfty f i

have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le (g := (‖f‖ₙ_[∞].toReal : 𝕜) • g) ?_ hr₀).trans_eq ?_
    · intro i
      rw [norm_mul, norm_smul, RCLike.norm_ofReal, abs_of_nonneg ENNReal.toReal_nonneg,
        ENNReal.coe_toReal (cLpNorm_ne_top f), mul_comm]
      gcongr
      exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top f i
    · rw [cLpNorm_smul, RCLike.norm_ofReal, abs_of_nonneg ENNReal.toReal_nonneg,
        ENNReal.coe_toReal (cLpNorm_ne_top f)]

have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    exact cLpNorm_le_cLinftyNorm_mul_cLpNorm hr₀ f g

have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    refine cLpNorm_le_mul_cLpNorm_of_norm_le hr₀ fun i ↦ ?_
    rw [norm_mul]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _

obtain rfl := ENNReal.HolderTriple.top_left_iff.mp hpqr
    exact cLpNorm_le_cLinftyNorm_mul_cLpNorm hr₀ f g
  · sorry

have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
    subst this
    by_cases hf : ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] = ∞
    · simp [hf]
    lift ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] to ℝ≥0 using hf with C hC
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(C : ℝ) • g‖ₙ_[r] := by
        refine cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_
        simp only [norm_mul, norm_smul, Real.norm_coe_nnreal, mul_comm]
        gcongr
        rw [← hC]
        exact cLpNorm_le_infty _ _
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] * ‖g‖ₙ_[r] := by simp [hC, cLpNorm_smul]

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, zero_add] at hpqr
    have : q = r := by rw [← ENNReal.inv_inv q, hpqr, ENNReal.inv_inv]
    subst this
    refine (cLpNorm_mono fun a ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_const_mul _ _)
    rw [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul]
    gcongr
    exact cLpNorm_le_top f a

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top, ENNReal.top_add_inv, zero_add] at hpqr
    have : q = r := by rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_inv, hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv]; simp
    subst this
    lift ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] to ℝ≥0 using cLpNorm_ne_top f with m hm
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g i‖‖ₙ_[r] := by simp_rw [norm_mul, cLpNorm_norm]
      _ ≤ ‖fun i ↦ (m : ℝ) * ‖g i‖‖ₙ_[r] := by
        gcongr with i
        rw [hm]
        exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[∞] * ‖g‖ₙ_[r] := by rw [cLpNorm_const_mul, cLpNorm_norm, ← hm, ENNReal.coe_mul]
  · sorry

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, zero_add] at hpqr
    have : q = r := ENNReal.inv_injective hpqr
    subst q
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖ * ‖g a‖‖ₙ_[r] := by congr with a; simp [norm_mul]
      _ ≤ ‖fun a ↦ ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g a‖‖ₙ_[r] := cLpNorm_mono_le fun a ↦ by
          gcongr; exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g‖ₙ_[r] := cLpNorm_const_mul _ _

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, zero_add] at hpqr

    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _) (norm_nonneg _)
